rows.label: tev057301_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev057301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Loma about NLA.

rows.label: tev057301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev057301_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Loma if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev057301_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Loma what things were
like during the attack.

rows.label: tev057301_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Loma about life in NLA.

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Loma takes role as aide of elder very
seriously and decided to do tour of city
right after moving in. It took FOREVER![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0002
rows.name:
In fact, Loma needs to
file formal complaint.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0003
rows.name:
Why is entire city full of fall-y places? So
dangerous! Loma has already kerplunged through
gaps more times than Loma can count.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0004
rows.name:
In fact, Loma kerplunged so many times that
formerly poor swimming ability has now become
second-to-none from so much practice![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0008
rows.name:
Lots of people get tricked because they
think Nopon are cute and innocent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0009
rows.name:
But if friend hears about Nopon breaking
contracts or doing underhanded business,
friend must tell Loma right away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0010
rows.name:
Loma is aide to Elder Nan, and aide
has to keep other Nopon in line.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0011
rows.name:
One shady Nopon breaking rules
is enough to threaten bright
future of all Nopon merchants![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0012
rows.name:
That is why Loma must deliver
blazing uppercut of Nopon
justice to all who go astray.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0022
rows.name:
Loma came back to city to make sure it
was safe enough for Elder Nan, but friends
still not done cleaning up aftermath.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0023
rows.name: Shiny blue blood was everywhere! Mo-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0024
rows.name:
Loma was confused at first because
most living things have red blood,
but now Loma understands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0025
rows.name:
Loma hopes friends are able to get their
real red-blooded bodies back soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0026
rows.name:
Loma is grateful to human friends for
creating Mira where elder can be safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0027
rows.name:
But even with Growth threat in past,
human city still poses many dangers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0028
rows.name:
Large hunks of metal often come swinging
by and send unsuspecting Nopon flying.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0029
rows.name:
And some human friends treat
Nopon like cute pets and try to
take them home! Incorrigible![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0030
rows.name:
Work cut out for Loma
to keep elder safe...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Loma about recent developments.

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0013
rows.name:
Loma just KNOW that Bodaboda is up to
no good, but cannot find proof. Where
did that scoundrel get the goods?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0014
rows.name:
Loma carefully screened every
single Nopon who entered city...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0015
rows.name:
Loma hopes BLADE friend will be
first to speak up if any suspicious
Nopon activity is witnessed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0016
rows.name:
Those pollen orbs are spreading
like plague among Nopon, turning
them into do-nothing lazypons![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0017
rows.name:
As aide of Elder Nan, Loma cannot
let crisis continue unaddressed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Loma about recent developments.

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0018
rows.name:
Nopon authorities managed to
confiscate all red pollen orbs
from Bodaboda and accomplice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0019
rows.name:
Loma is sad for any world where
evil Nopon try to profit off
red pollen orbs. Mo-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0020
rows.name:
Assistance of friend
has been duly noted![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057301_MSG0021
rows.name:
Criminals will be sentenced to unpaid
hard labor. Serves them right! Mo![ST:wait ]
